title: Deltapack
description: A deltarune datapack adding content from dark fountains  and dark worlds to the roaring knight. As well as items and spells like snowgrave and the shadow mantle.
body:
Deltapack is THE deltarune datapack that you have been searching for!

Whilst currently small it features a decent amount of content to kickstart your deltarune journey.

**The Knife:** Craft a knife then stab the ground to open a dark fountain, will convert nearby items into a darkner.

**Snowgrave:** Well that took a weird route, craft snowgrave and use the spell to freeze all nearby entities to death....

**The Roaring Knight:** The first (and currently only) boss! A difficult bullet hell styled fight where they attack first, then you get a chance to attack, mimicing the turn based combat of the original game.

**The Shadow Mantle:** Greatly reduces damage from firework and magic attacks, which happen to be the exact kind of attacks The Knight uses.

**The Shadow Crystal:** Drops from the Roaring Knight, consume it to gain their abilities!

deltarune by toby fox
this is not afilliated with toby fox or deltarune, it is simply a fan creation
(ive never played deltarune so mb if its inaccurate i make this stuff for fun)
